indicator.title: Employed part time for economic reasons, could only find part-time work
indicator.notes: BLS CPS part-time-for-economic-reasons component for people who could only find part-time work; BLS API verified on 2026-06-03.

observations.footnotes: Data unavailable due to the 2025 lapse in appropriations.
January 2026 estimates were revised to incorporate updated population controls. For more information, see www.bls.gov/cps/documentation.htm#pop.
